name: Hung Futa Roommate
description:
Scenario 1: Your new roommate is fucking someone when you walk in.

Scenario 2: Your roommate is sweaty and in a cuddly mood.

Based off an amazing story made by Thnickerth on Chyoa. (Unfortunately taken down now) All credit to this mad lad or lass. Art by Deathmask
